ddls:
CREATE TABLE "trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trail */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of trail (e.g., hiking, biking, horseback riding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trail */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the trail in miles */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the trail (e.g., easy, moderate, difficult) */,
  "park_id" INTEGER /* ID of the park the trail belongs to */,
  "start_point" TEXT /* Coordinates for the starting point of the trail */,
  "end_point" TEXT /* Coordinates for the endpoint of the trail */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the trail was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the trail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail segment */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the segment belongs to */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the segment */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the segment */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the segment in feet */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope of the segment in degrees */,
  "index" INTEGER /* Index of the segment within the trail */,
  "start_elevation" REAL /* Elevation at the start of the segment */,
  "end_elevation" REAL /* Elevation at the end of the segment */,
  "trail_segment_type" TEXT /* Type of segment (e.g., flat, uphill, downhill) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_segments_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trail condition */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the condition belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the condition */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the trail (e.g., open, closed, maintenance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the condition */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the condition ended */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the condition */,
  "resolved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the condition was reported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_conditions_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_conditions_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_conditions_resolved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance event */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the maintenance belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., renovation, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance ended */,
  "created_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the maintenance */,
  "resolved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the maintenance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the maintenance was reported */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_created_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("created_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_resolved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the usage belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the usage */,
  "visitors" INTEGER /* Number of visitors */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Time when the usage was recorded */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Time when the usage ended */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the usage record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, ranger, visitor) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role that the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view_trails, edit_trails) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the map belongs to */,
  "map_data" TEXT /* Map data (e.g., image, pdf) */,
  "map_type" TEXT /* Type of map (e.g., topographic, trail, satellite) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the map was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_maps_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the weather belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the weather data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the weather data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency service */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the service belongs to */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., medical, fire) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the service */,
  "response_time" REAL /* Average response time in minutes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the service was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the service */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_services_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trail_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trail that the review belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the trail (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "review" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trail_reviews_trail_id FOREIGN KEY ("trail_id") REFERENCES trails ("trail_id")
)
